title: BBVA partners AWS to build architecture for faster AI deployment
text: BBVA has enlisted Amazon Web Services to help roll out a machine learning operations (MLOps) framework that will help the Spanish bank speed up its deployment of AI models.

title: UK Finance calls for closer UK-EU ties
text: Ten years after the Brexit referendum, UK Finance, in partnership with Freshfields, has called on the EU and the UK to put financial services on the agenda for the upcoming Leaders’ Summit, and place it within the political reset to build a more strategic financial services relationship.
